subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that the effulgent Countenances of sanctified glory and the holy Visages of cherished intimacy have freed the Body of the Eternal Mystery from the veils of otherness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله که طلعات مجد قدسیه و وجهات انس عزیه جسد سر ازلی را از حجبات غیریه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
